title: stirlingia simplex
intro: Stirlingia simplex, also known as Stirlingia, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New South Wales. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Stirlingia simplex is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
